# katapult_object_storage_access_key (Resource)

Manages an S3-compatible access key for a Katapult object storage cluster.

Use `s3_access_key_id`, `s3_secret_access_key`, and `server_url` to configure any S3-compatible client or SDK. Bucket-level permissions are managed via `read_key_ids` / `write_key_ids` on `katapult_object_storage_bucket` resources; `read_buckets` and `write_buckets` here reflect those associations.

~> **Note:** `s3_secret_access_key` is only available at creation time and cannot be retrieved again — it will be empty after import. Changing `region` forces a new resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Minimal — key with no global permissions
resource "katapult_object_storage_access_key" "app" {
  name   = "app-server"
  region = "uk-lon-1"
}

# Key with cluster-wide read/write access
resource "katapult_object_storage_access_key" "admin" {
  name   = "ci-admin"
  region = "uk-lon-1"

  all_buckets_read  = true
  all_objects_read  = true
  all_objects_write = true
}

# Use the credentials to configure an S3 client (e.g. AWS provider)
resource "katapult_object_storage_access_key" "backup" {
  name   = "backup-agent"
  region = "uk-lon-1"
}

resource "katapult_object_storage_bucket" "backups" {
  name          = "my-org-backups"
  region        = "uk-lon-1"
  read_key_ids  = [katapult_object_storage_access_key.backup.id]
  write_key_ids = [katapult_object_storage_access_key.backup.id]
}

output "backup_s3_access_key_id" {
  value = katapult_object_storage_access_key.backup.s3_access_key_id
}

output "backup_s3_secret_access_key" {
  value     = katapult_object_storage_access_key.backup.s3_secret_access_key
  sensitive = true
}

output "backup_server_url" {
  value = katapult_object_storage_access_key.backup.server_url
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable name for the access key.
- `region` (String) Region permalink, e.g. `uk-lon-1`. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `all_buckets_read` (Boolean) Allow this key to list all buckets in the cluster. Defaults to `false`.
- `all_objects_read` (Boolean) Allow this key to read objects across all buckets in the cluster. Defaults to `false`.
- `all_objects_write` (Boolean) Allow this key to write objects across all buckets in the cluster. Defaults to `false`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Internal Katapult ID of the access key.
- `read_buckets` (Set of String) Bucket names this key can read from. Populated via a bucket's `read_key_ids`.
- `s3_access_key_id` (String) S3 access key ID for authenticating S3 clients.
- `s3_secret_access_key` (String, Sensitive) S3 secret access key. Available only at creation; not retrievable via the API. Empty after import.
- `server_url` (String) S3-compatible endpoint URL for configuring S3 clients.
- `write_buckets` (Set of String) Bucket names this key can write to. Populated via a bucket's `write_key_ids`.
